metadata.description: InvestorClaw Claude Code plugin marketplace entry. Phase 3.5 of IC_DECOMPOSITION moved the plugin source out of this repo into gitlab.com/argonautsystems/InvestorClaude. This marketplace forwards installs there so existing /plugin marketplace add subscribers continue to work.

plugins.name: investorclaw
plugins.description: Multi-account portfolio analysis: holdings, performance, bonds, analyst consensus, news correlation, and reporting. Backed by ic-engine + clio.
